_doc: Per-image Gemini prompts for Groq Whisper Transcription in 50 Lines. {palette} resolves at runtime.

cover.prompt:
Editorial book cover for a downloadable lead magnet PDF. Aspect: portrait, 3:4, US letter book cover proportions.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed.
2. Never render the words 'Inter', 'Inter Regular', 'Inter Display Bold', 'JetBrains Mono', 'sans serif', or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character.
4. The transcribed text bars on the right side of the central visual must NOT contain any legible English words. They are stylized horizontal bars representing text lines, not actual readable text.
5. The soundwave on the left side must NOT contain any numeric labels, frequency markers, or axis text.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing more):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: FREE PLAYBOOK
B. Upper-third headline across two lines: line 1 reads 'Groq Whisper Transcription', line 2 reads 'in 50 Lines'.
C. Subtitle inside a horizontal off-white translucent panel directly below the headline, one short line: A 50-line Node service. 250x realtime. $0.04 per audio hour. Drop-in OpenAI Whisper replacement.
D. Bottom-left small wordmark: AI BrandFactory

CENTRAL VISUAL (this is the hero of the cover, fills the lower 60 percent of the cover):
A two-half composition split across the lower 60 percent of the cover. Left half: a stylized soundwave pattern. Right half: clean transcribed text lines rendered as stylized horizontal bars. A thin cyan flow line in the middle bridges the two halves, suggesting the audio-to-text transformation.

LEFT HALF (soundwave):
- A horizontal soundwave waveform spanning the full vertical center of the left half. The waveform consists of vertical bars of varying heights (peaks and troughs) representing audio amplitude over time.
- Approximately 60 to 80 vertical bars, evenly spaced horizontally, with heights varying between 5 and 100 percent of the available vertical space.
- The waveform has a natural, organic shape: tall peaks clustered in the middle, smaller bars at the edges, and intermittent very tall spikes that suggest emphasis in speech.
- Bar color: bright cyan #06B6D4 with a soft cyan glow around the tallest peaks.
- Bar width: each bar is thin (about 3 to 4 pixels wide) with a small gap between bars.
- The waveform sits horizontally centered within the left half, with significant vertical breathing room above and below.

MIDDLE BRIDGE (between left and right halves):
- A thin bright cyan #06B6D4 horizontal arrow or flow line connecting the right edge of the soundwave to the left edge of the text bars.
- The arrow is simple and minimal: a thin line ending in a small arrowhead pointing right.
- Soft cyan glow around the arrowhead.
- The bridge sits at the vertical center of the composition.

RIGHT HALF (transcribed text bars):
- 4 stylized horizontal text-line bars stacked vertically with even spacing, representing transcribed text.
- Each bar is a long thin off-white #FAF9FF horizontal rectangle with rounded corners.
- Bars have varying lengths to suggest natural sentence variation: bar 1 is roughly 90 percent of the available width, bar 2 is 70 percent, bar 3 is 95 percent, bar 4 is 60 percent. All bars are left-aligned.
- Bar height: each bar is a thin horizontal stroke (about 8 to 12 pixels tall).
- Off-white fill at about 85 percent opacity.
- A small bright cyan #06B6D4 timestamp dot appears to the left of each bar (a small filled circle, about 4 to 6 pixels in diameter), suggesting the timestamp markers in transcribed output.
- The text bars sit centered within the right half, vertically aligned with the soundwave on the left.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Cover headline lines 1 and 2: large bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF, tight letter spacing.
- Subtitle panel: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside the off-white panel.
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Wordmark: clean light-weight sans-serif, off-white.

Design language:
- Premium editorial cover with a topic-specific audio-to-text composition as the centerpiece.
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, subtle bright cyan bloom upper right.
- Layout: pill + headline + subtitle panel in upper third, the audio-to-text composition dominates the lower 60 percent, wordmark anchored bottom-left.
- Subtle paper grain texture across the whole frame.
- Echoes the system-illustration approach of P09 Multi-Agent Playbook (a topic-specific central composition that telegraphs the playbook content) with an audio waveform plus transcribed text bars replacing the hexagon network.

Color palette: {palette}.

What to avoid:
- No diagonal cyan accent line crossing the frame.
- No grid of small text pills (no WHAT IS INSIDE row).
- No funnel composition (that was P38, do not reuse).
- No concentric rings composition (that was P37, do not reuse).
- No horizontal stacked-bars composition (that was P36).
- No vintage ad mockups or fanned card stack composition (that was P39, do not reuse).
- No location pins or map composition (that was P40, do not reuse).
- No browser window or extension popup mockups (that was P42, do not reuse).
- No flow / arrow / pipeline composition beyond the single thin bridge arrow described above.
- No realistic microphone clip art. No realistic speaker icons. No realistic headphone illustrations.
- No realistic audio software UI mockups (no Audacity, no Logic Pro, no Pro Tools).
- No human figures, no faces, no avatars, no illustrations of people.
- No emoji icons.
- No realistic clip art, no realistic illustrations of laptops, phones, screens, or apps.
- No literal brand logos. No Groq logo. No OpenAI logo. No company logos visible anywhere.
- No legible English text inside the transcribed text bars (they are abstract shapes).
- No numeric labels or frequency markers on the soundwave.

Output: a single high-quality cover image, print-ready, 4K.

hero.prompt:
Wide hero banner for a squeeze page giving away 'Groq Whisper Transcription in 50 Lines'. Aspect: 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
- NO rendered text anywhere in the image.
- No font names or typography labels.
- No legible English words inside any text-bar shapes.
- No numeric labels or frequency markers on any soundwave shapes.

Composition: a 3D-rendered isometric mockup of a US-letter PDF cover floating on the right third, soft drop shadow on a textured editorial background. The PDF cover shows the same audio-to-text composition from the cover design.

On the left two-thirds: an abstract version of the audio-to-text motif rendered at low opacity. A stylized horizontal soundwave on the far left third, made of about 40 thin vertical bright cyan #06B6D4 bars of varying heights at roughly 35 percent opacity. A thin bright cyan flow line bridges from the right edge of the soundwave toward the PDF mockup. To the right of the flow line, 3 to 4 stylized horizontal text-line bars in off-white #FAF9FF at roughly 30 percent opacity, each with a small bright cyan timestamp dot to its left. The motif fades into the background gradient toward the PDF mockup so the mockup remains the focal point.

Background:
- Top half: deep indigo #1A0B4B fading to electric purple #7C3AED.
- Bottom half: off-white #FAF9FF with faint mesh gradient bloom.
- PDF mockup on the dividing line.
- Subtle paper grain.

Style:
- Premium editorial, restrained.
- No people, no faces, no brand logos (no Groq logo, no OpenAI logo), no realistic microphone clip art, no realistic headphones, no realistic audio software UI, no padlock or shield icons.
- The audio-to-text motif is the recurring shape, rendered subtly so the PDF mockup remains the focal point.
- No diagonal cyan accent line. No funnel. No concentric rings. No vintage ad mockup card stack. No location pins. No browser windows.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single 4K hero image.

og.prompt:
Open Graph social share card image, 1.91:1 widescreen.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. Contains ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names or typography instructions.
3. Spell every word exactly as written.
4. NO legible English words inside any text-bar shapes on the right.
5. NO numeric labels or frequency markers on the soundwave shapes on the right.

TEXT TO RENDER:
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase: AI BRANDFACTORY
B. Centered massive headline two lines: line 1 reads 'Groq Whisper Transcription', line 2 reads 'in 50 Lines'. Line 2 should be smaller than line 1.
C. Below headline, off-white rounded subtitle pill, one line: A 50-line Node service. 250x realtime. $0.04 per audio hour. Drop-in OpenAI Whisper replacement.
D. Below subtitle pill, horizontal text strip with middle-dot separators: Speed Comparison · The 50-Line Service · Setup · Format Handling · Error Fixes · Real Pipelines
E. Bottom-right small label, faded: files.aibrandfactory.com

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Headline line 1: massive bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF.
- Headline line 2: smaller medium-weight sans-serif, off-white at 80% opacity.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside pill.
- Stages strip: clean medium-weight sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, smaller size.
- Bottom-right label: clean sans-serif, off-white 70%.

Background: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient at 135 degrees. On the right third, an abstract version of the audio-to-text motif: a small stylized soundwave (about 30 thin vertical bright cyan bars of varying heights), a thin bright cyan flow line bridging right, and 3 stylized horizontal text-line bars in off-white with small bright cyan timestamp dots to the left of each bar. The motif sits compactly within the right third without crowding the headline.

What to avoid:
- No people, no faces, no brand logos (no Groq logo, no OpenAI logo), no realistic microphone clip art, no realistic headphones, no realistic audio software UI, no padlock or shield icons, no emoji.
- No additional text beyond the pieces listed.
- No legible English text inside the text bars.
- No reuse of the diagonal cyan accent line motif. No funnel composition (P38). No vintage ad mockup card stack (P39). No concentric rings (P37). No location pins (P40). No browser window mockups (P42).

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: sharp, ready as og:image.

notion-cover.prompt:
Wide editorial banner for a Notion page header. Aspect 21:9.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: NO title, NO headline, NO wordmark, NO logo, NO labels in the corners. NO legible English words anywhere in the image. NO numeric labels or frequency markers on any soundwave shapes. NO legible English words inside any text-bar shapes.

Composition:
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B on the left fading to electric purple #7C3AED on the right, subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 bloom upper right.
- Across the full frame edge-to-edge, a continuous stylized horizontal soundwave on the left half of the banner: about 80 to 100 thin vertical bright cyan #06B6D4 bars of varying heights, organic shape with peaks and troughs, suggesting the amplitude pattern of recorded speech.
- A thin bright cyan flow line bridges from the right edge of the soundwave across the center of the banner.
- On the right half of the banner, 5 to 6 stylized horizontal text-line bars in off-white #FAF9FF at about 85 percent opacity, stacked vertically with even spacing. Each bar has a small bright cyan timestamp dot to its left. Bar lengths vary to suggest natural sentence variation. The bars are abstract shapes, not legible text.
- Subtle paper grain across the entire banner.

What to avoid:
- No corner text. No wordmark. No logos.
- No brand logos of any kind (no Groq logo, no OpenAI logo).
- No legible English text or labels anywhere.
- No realistic microphone clip art. No realistic headphones. No realistic audio software UI.
- No emoji, no clip art, no realistic icons.
- No diagonal accent line crossing the frame.
- No padlock or shield icons.
- No funnel composition (P38). No concentric rings composition (P37). No vintage ad mockup card stack (P39). No location pins (P40). No browser window mockups (P42).

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 4K cinematic banner.
